depth_sharpness_methodology.rubric: Each above-threshold nugget routed to a depth page is scored 0-10 on whether the page renders the verbatim claim with its specific number, scope, and caveat — not a generic restatement. A nugget that appears as a one-line stat without context scores low; one rendered with its 250-600 word treatment plus open-question linkage scores high.
depth_sharpness_methodology.scale: 0=absent · 4=cited as a stat only · 7=full claim w/ scope · 10=verbatim + caveat + open-question pairing

depth_sharpness_per_nugget.render_treatment: full Pattern D learning section + AUC gauge + evidence-block + open question
depth_sharpness_per_nugget.verbatim_phrasing: We paid experienced FLWs to fake 100 visit records each across three rounds and offered bonuses to the top 25% most convincing fabricators. Out of 33 adversarial fakers, 97.5% of real workers scored cleaner than even the lowest-scoring fabricator — using just three data points (age, gender, MUAC). AUC 0.91 ± 0.09.

top_3_verbatim_renders.verbatim: We paid experienced FLWs to fake 100 visit records each across three rounds and offered bonuses to the top 25% most convincing fabricators. Out of 33 adversarial fakers, 97.5% of real workers scored cleaner than even the lowest-scoring fabricator — using just three data points (age, gender, MUAC). AUC 0.91 ± 0.09.

Our Malawi ECD pilot (76 FLWs, 9,510+ visits, 50-caregiver baseline/endline) found nearly all caregivers already held positive ECD attitudes at baseline. The intervention didn't need to convince them — it needed to close the gap between belief and practice. Knowledge of rapid-development timing rose +33%; observed teaching behavior +21%; encouragement of autonomy +21% but still only 47% at endline. So we doubled the dosage from 3 visits to 8–10 across 12 months.

Funders routinely ask whether paid campaign work crowds out volunteer health work. We commissioned 24 in-depth interviews in Gombe and Sokoto (CHC, 2025). Campaigns are not a disruption of Nigeria's CHV system — they are the system. CHVs routinely run campaigns, and other volunteers cover routine work during them. In Gombe, FLWs maintained volunteer hours by shifting schedules within Connect's 7am–7pm window.
